content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
August 30, 2002

Lee Yarborough
485 Grove Acre Avenue
Pacific Grove, CA 93950

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-230

Dear Mr. Yarborough:

This letter reiterates our conversation of August 22, 2002. As the executive director of the Transportation Agency for Monterey County ("TAMC") and a potential Pacific Grove TAMC appointee, you asked whether these were "incompatible" offices. Commission jurisdiction is limited to the provisions of the Political Reform Act.1 The prohibition on "incompatible" offices is implemented by the state Attorney General.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\02-230

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
